input.command:

git add components/G1MidiProtocol/G1MidiProtocol.cpp components/spi_command/SPI_Command_Slave.h
git commit -q -F - <<'EOF'
fix: slice preset over ESP32->STM32 SPI + advertise as Gen2 so App can find MINI2

- do_save_preset(): slice the packed preset into [total_slices][slice_index]
  [payload] frames matching the STM32 do_save_preset reassembly. Ported from

cd /d/mybot/git/pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt
echo "=== gh auth ==="
gh auth status 2>&1 | head -6
echo ""
echo "=== push branch ==="
git push -u origin fix/preset-slice-esp32 2>&1 | tail -8
echo ""
echo "=== base branch ==="
git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's#refs/remotes/origin/##'

echo ""
echo "=== git authors matching ken ==="
git log --all --format='%an <%ae>' 2>/dev/null | grep -i "ken" | sort -u | head
echo ""
e

cd /d/mybot/git/pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt
